changes.value:
## What

Implement `get_implementations` — find implementations of a trait/interface. Follows the same pattern as `get_definition` (location-returning, enriched).

### `get_implementations` — `textDocument/implementation`
- New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs`
- Takes `LspContext` + `GetImplementationsOptions { file_path, line, character, max_results }`
- Calls `textDocument/didOpen`, `textDocument/implementation`, `textDocument/didClose`
- Parses response as locations, enriches with `lsp_symbols`, optionally reads source text
- Reuses `DefinitionLocation` from `get_definition` card (or defines compatible type)

### MCP registration
- Add operation struct, match arm, handler in `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs`

### Files to create/modify
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs` — new
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/mod.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lib.rs` — re-export
- `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Returns implementation locations with enriched symbol info
- [ ] Includes source text at each implementation site
- [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: response parsing handles Location and LocationLink formats
- [ ] Unit test: `max_results` truncation
- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns error
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

## Workflow
- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.

#lsp-live

--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,16 +1,14 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_implementations` — find implementations of a trait/interface. Follows the same pattern as `get_definition` (location-returning, enriched).
+Implement `get_implementations` — find implementations of a trait/interface. Uses layered resolution.

-### `get_implementations` — `textDocument/implementation`
+### `get_implementations` — layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs`
-- Takes `LspContext` + `GetImplementationsOptions { file_path, line, character, max_results }`
-- Calls `textDocument/didOpen`, `textDocument/implementation`, `textDocument/didClose`
-- Parses response as locations, enriches with `lsp_symbols`, optionally reads source text
-- Reuses `DefinitionLocation` from `get_definition` card (or defines compatible type)
-
-### MCP registration
-- Add operation struct, match arm, handler in `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs`
+- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetImplementationsOptions { file_path, line, character, max_results }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `didOpen` → `textDocument/implementation` → `didClose`. Full cross-file implementation finding.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: No direct equivalent in indexed data — implementation relationships aren't stored. Return empty + notice.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Could search for `impl TraitName` patterns in `ts_chunks` as a heuristic. Low quality but better than nothing for Rust.
+- Enriches results with `enrich_location()`; reuses `DefinitionLocation` type

 ### Files to create/modify
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs` — new
@@ -19,15 +17,16 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns implementation locations with enriched symbol info
-- [ ] Includes source text at each implementation site
+- [ ] Returns implementation locations via live LSP when available
+- [ ] Gracefully returns empty result (not error) when no live LSP and no index data
+- [ ] Enriches results with symbol info via `enrich_location()`
 - [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
 - [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool

 ## Tests
 - [ ] Unit test: response parsing handles Location and LocationLink formats
+- [ ] Unit test: empty result when no layers available (not error)
 - [ ] Unit test: `max_results` truncation
-- [ ] Integration test: missing LSP client returns error
 - [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-code-context` passes

 ## Workflow

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 ## What

-Implement `get_implementations` — find implementations of a trait/interface. Uses layered resolution.
+Implement `get_implementations` — find implementations of a trait/interface. Uses layered resolution via `LayeredContext`.

 ### `get_implementations` — layered
 - New file: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs`
-- Takes `LayeredContext` + `GetImplementationsOptions { file_path, line, character, max_results }`
-- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `didOpen` → `textDocument/implementation` → `didClose`. Full cross-file implementation finding.
-- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: No direct equivalent in indexed data — implementation relationships aren't stored. Return empty + notice.
-- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: Could search for `impl TraitName` patterns in `ts_chunks` as a heuristic. Low quality but better than nothing for Rust.
-- Enriches results with `enrich_location()`; reuses `DefinitionLocation` type
+- Takes `&LayeredContext` + `GetImplementationsOptions { file_path, line, character, max_results }`
+- **Layer 1 (live LSP)**: `ctx.lsp_notify()` didOpen → `ctx.lsp_request("textDocument/implementation", ...)` → `ctx.lsp_notify()` didClose. Full cross-file implementation finding.
+- **Layer 2 (LSP index)**: No direct equivalent — implementation relationships aren't stored in `lsp_symbols`/`lsp_call_edges`. Skip.
+- **Layer 3 (tree-sitter)**: `ctx.ts_chunks_matching("impl TraitName", max)` — heuristic pattern search. Low quality but better than nothing for Rust.
+- Enriches results with `ctx.enrich_location()`; reuses `DefinitionLocation` type.

 ### Files to create/modify
 - `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_implementations.rs` — new
@@ -17,11 +17,11 @@
 - `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/code_context/mod.rs` — registration + handler

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Returns implementation locations via live LSP when available
-- [ ] Gracefully returns empty result (not error) when no live LSP and no index data
-- [ ] Enriches results with symbol info via `enrich_location()`
-- [ ] Respects `max_results` limit
-- [ ] Appears as MCP operation under `code_context` tool
+- [ ] Returns implementation locations via `ctx.lsp_request()` when live LSP available
+- [ ] Falls back to `ctx.ts_chunks_matching()` heuristic when no live LSP
+- [ ] Returns empty (not error) when `!ctx.has_live_lsp()` and no heuristic matches
+- [ ] Enriches results via `ctx.enrich_location()`
+- [ ] Respects `max_results`

 ## Tests
 - [ ] Unit test: response parsing handles Location and LocationLink formats
